name: Metasploit Or Impacket Service Installation Via SMB PsExec
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Bartlomiej Czyz, Relativity
SIGMA Title: Metasploit Or Impacket Service Installation Via SMB PsExec
SIGMA Description: Detects usage of Metasploit SMB PsExec (exploit/windows/smb/psexec) and Impacket psexec.py by triggering on specific service installation

False positives:
- Possible, different agents with a 8 character binary and a 4, 8 or 16 character service name

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND "Service Filename" MATCHES '^%systemroot%\\[a-zA-Z]{8}\.exe$' AND "Service Name" MATCHES '(^[a-zA-Z]{4}$)|(^[a-zA-Z]{8}$)|(^[a-zA-Z]{16}$)' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%servicestarttype%3%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x10%') AND (NOT("Service Name"='PSEXESVC')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Metasploit Or Impacket Service Installation Via SMB PsExec on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID"=4697 AND "Service Filename" MATCHES '^%systemroot%\\[a-zA-Z]{8}\.exe$' AND "Service Name" MATCHES '(^[a-zA-Z]{4}$)|(^[a-zA-Z]{8}$)|(^[a-zA-Z]{16}$)' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%servicestarttype%3%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%0x10%') AND (NOT("Service Name"='PSEXESVC')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Metasploit Or Impacket Service Installation Via SMB PsExec

Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Event Name
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
